confidence_notes: All skills extracted from concrete work experience (internship) and deployed projects with explicit technology mentions. Skills section corroborated by project implementations. No aspirational skills included.

projects.name: InternTracker — Job Application Tracker
projects.summary: Full-stack SaaS application with React frontend, Node.js backend, and PostgreSQL database. Features include Clerk authentication, drag-and-drop Kanban board, and email reminders. Deployed to AWS EC2 and live at interntracker.io. Achieved 500+ registered users within 2 weeks of launch and won $5,000 prize at HackUCLA 2024.

projects.name: PricePulse — E-Commerce Price Monitor
projects.summary: Python-based web scraper deployed as AWS Lambda cron job monitoring 3,000+ product listings daily. Sends email alerts for price drops exceeding 15%. Handles 10,000+ requests per day with Redis caching layer reducing repeat API calls by 80%.

projects.name: FinanceApp Inc. Dashboard Optimization
projects.summary: Rebuilt user dashboard with React and TypeScript, optimizing performance through code-splitting and lazy loading. Optimized PostgreSQL queries with composite indexes. Deployed to production on Vercel serving 22,000 monthly active users.

impact_highlights.description: Reduced dashboard page load time from 3.2 seconds to 1.4 seconds through code-splitting and lazy loading of chart components.
Optimized 3 slow PostgreSQL queries by adding composite indexes, significantly improving database performance.
impact_highlights.metric: 62% reduction in average query time (from 850ms to 320ms)

impact_highlights.description: InternTracker SaaS application achieved rapid user adoption and won hackathon competition.
PricePulse web scraper deployed to production handling significant daily request volume with efficient caching.
impact_highlights.metric: 10,000+ requests per day; 80% reduction in repeat API calls via Redis caching

impact_highlights.description: FinanceApp dashboard optimization reached significant production user base.

confidence_metrics.confidence_notes: All 12 skills directly corroborated by internship experience and deployed projects with explicit technology mentions. No self-reported skills without project backing. Clear evidence of deployment and production use.

Three projects classified with strong evidence: InternTracker is full-stack SaaS with live deployment link and user metrics; PricePulse is data engineering/ETL with AWS Lambda and caching; FinanceApp is full-stack with production deployment and performance metrics.

Impact highlights extracted from concrete metrics: page load time reduction (1.8s), query optimization (62%), user acquisition (500+ in 2 weeks), request handling (10k/day), and production scale (22k MAU). All claims supported by specific numbers.
